channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Two Albanian nationals arrested in Calais with firearm attempting illegal entry to Britain
item.description: French authorities in Calais arrested two Albanian men and the driver of a lorry on Friday as the vehicle prepared to board a ferry to Britain. The men were found carrying a handgun fitted with a sile...

item.title: Early report shows Australia’s teen social media ban faces major challenges
item.description: Australia’s ambitious attempt to keep teenagers off social media is already showing signs of trouble. According to the first report from the eSafety Commissioner, the law requiring social media platfo...

item.title: Kairo Forbes Honoured With Two Awards at Modelling Graduation
item.description: Young Kairo Forbes celebrated a significant achievement at her recent modelling graduation in Johannesburg, walking away with both the Junior Model of the Year 2026 and Junior Judges Choice Overall aw...

item.title: U.S. Lawmakers Urge Continuation of Humanitarian Aid to Seven African Nations
item.description: Representatives Gregory Meeks and Sara Jacobs, along with other Democrats from the House Foreign Affairs Africa Subcommittee, don raise alarm say U.S. State Department dey plan to cut lifesaving aid t...

item.title: Latin Patriarch Regains Access to Holy Sepulchre After Initial Restrictions
item.description: Israeli authorities initially blocked Cardinal Pierbattista Pizzaballa, the Latin Patriarch of Jerusalem, from entering the Church of the Holy Sepulchre on Palm Sunday, citing security concerns due to...

item.title: Pakistani Forces Respond After Afghan Taliban Cross-Border Fire in Bajaur
item.description: On Monday, in the Bajaur sector of Khyber Pakhtunkhwa, Pakistani and Afghan forces engaged in cross-border firing, according to security sources. The clash began when Afghan Taliban fighters opened fi...

item.title: Ricky Ponting trusts Punjab Kings’ batting flexibility ahead of IPL 2026 clash with Gujarat Titans
item.description: Ahead of Punjab Kings’ IPL 2026 clash against Gujarat Titans, head coach Ricky Ponting expressed firm confidence in the team's batting depth and flexibility despite the departure of Josh Inglis. Ingli...

item.title: Starmer warns doctors to reconsider strike action or lose NHS expansion deal
item.description: Prime Minister Sir Keir Starmer has given resident doctors in England a 48-hour deadline to reconsider their planned six-day strike scheduled for early April. The dispute centres on pay and working co...

item.title: Gang Violence in Western Haiti Forces Thousands to Flee Ahead of International Intervention
item.description: Haiti’s western Artibonite department has been hit by deadly gang violence, leaving dozens dead and thousands displaced just ahead of the anticipated arrival of an international force aimed at curbing...

item.title: FPJ’s Batang Quiapo Cast Reflect on the Meaning of Forgiveness in Their Lives
item.description: In a recent feature by ABS-CBN Entertainment, the cast members of the hit primetime series 'FPJ’s Batang Quiapo' shared their personal reflections on forgiveness and how it shapes their lives both on ...

item.title: Improving First Nations Rehabilitation Programs to Reduce Reoffending
item.description: Australia faces a persistent crisis in First Nations incarceration, with Aboriginal and Torres Strait Islander adults and youth disproportionately represented in prisons. Despite accounting for just 3...

item.title: PCCB investigates 66 public projects over suspected mismanagement and weak contract controls
item.description: The Prevention and Combating of Corruption Bureau (PCCB) in Tanzania has launched investigations into 66 projects after detecting irregularities in the use of public funds. The review covered a total ...

item.title: President Marcos to Observe Holy Week in His Hometown of Ilocos Norte
item.description: President Ferdinand 'Bongbong' Marcos Jr. announced on March 31, 2026, that he will be spending the Holy Week in his hometown, Ilocos Norte. He mentioned to reporters that he plans to stay there for a...

item.title: 21 States and FCT Fail to Access N97 Billion Federal Education Grants, Imo and Ogun Worst Hit
item.description: From 2021 reach March 2026, data wey UBEC release show say 21 states and the FCT never fit meet the conditions to collect federal education grants wey suppose support basic education. Imo State top th...

item.title: Dadu Court Acquits Eight in Chandio Tribe Triple Murder Case Due to Insufficient Evidence
item.description: In a significant development from Dadu, the Model Criminal Court has acquitted all eight individuals accused in the high-profile triple murder case of former PPP Union Council chairman Raees Karamulla...

item.title: Tanzania Implements New Fuel Billing System to Enhance Transparency and Revenue
item.description: The Tanzania Revenue Authority (TRA) has recently introduced a new billing system for fuel loading and offloading at storage depots. This initiative aims to bolster government revenue collection, incr...

item.title: Chicago Bulls terminate Jaden Ivey over anti-LGBTQ remarks
item.description: The Chicago Bulls have officially terminated the contract of guard Jaden Ivey following his controversial remarks that were widely criticized as anti-LGBTQ. The team released a statement affirming the...

item.title: Israel enacts law imposing death penalty for Palestinians convicted of deadly attacks amid controversy
item.description: Israel’s parliament has passed legislation that allows for the death penalty by hanging for Palestinians convicted of deadly militant attacks. The law, widely seen as supported by the far-right, is pa...

item.title: Bringing Science Closer: How Communication Can Save Students from Ignorance and Disinformation
item.description: Dr. Joselito D. De Los Reyes, a UST professor and writer, reflects on his experiences as a panelist in a Science, Technology, and Society summit held at the University of Santo Tomas. He uses the lite...

item.title: Lagos State Extends Deadline for Individual Annual Tax Return Filing to April 14, 2026
item.description: The Lagos State Internal Revenue Service (LIRS) don extend the deadline for filing individual annual income tax returns by two weeks. Originally, taxpayers suppose to submit by April 1, but the new cu...
